name: argocd
explanation: ArgoCD ships several components, each exposing Prometheus metrics on a fixed well-known port: Application Controller (8082), ApplicationSet Controller (8080), API Server (8083), Repo Server (8084), Notifications Controller (9001) and Commit Server (8087), all at `/metrics`. The check is `OpenMetricsBaseCheckV2` and dispatches one scraper per declared endpoint; at least one endpoint must be set, but each is unauthenticated. Each component has a distinct AD identifier (e.g. `argocd-application-controller`, `argocd-server`, `argocd-repo-server`), so an openmetrics-port-scan keyed on the container name plus the component-specific port is sufficient.
notes: Pattern A with multiple component-specific endpoints (similar to cilium agent vs operator). Discovery should probe each component port; the check raises if no endpoint is set, but supplying one is enough to start collecting that component's metrics.
